publication.name: Abyot
publication.tagline: Revolution is not an event — it is a process.
publication.description: A vanguard publication for Marxist-Leninist analysis, anti-imperialist critique, and Ethiopian political discourse. We write for those who believe that understanding the world is the first step to changing it.

socials.description: Join our Telegram channel for daily analysis and breaking dispatches.
Video essays, lectures, and documentary analysis.
Long-form essays and subscriber-exclusive deep dives.
Our editor's regular column in Ethiopia's premier English-language news outlet.

newsletter.headline: The Revolutionary Dispatch
newsletter.description: Analysis, theory, and dispatches delivered to your inbox. No algorithms. No noise. Just clarity.
